<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<h1>Source code for booktx.chunking</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Sentence segmentation and chunk packing.</span>

<span class="sd">The extractor hands chunking a list of *protected prose spans* (each already</span>
<span class="sd">had names and inline tags replaced by placeholder tokens). chunking:</span>

<span class="sd">1. Segments each span into sentences with :mod:`phrasplit`.</span>
<span class="sd">2. Assigns each resulting sentence a stable record id.</span>
<span class="sd">3. Packs records into :class:`~booktx.models.Chunk` objects of at most</span>
<span class="sd">   ``chunk_size`` records, numbering chunks from 1.</span>

<span class="sd">Record ids are ``NNNN-NNNNNN``: the 4-digit chunk id, a dash, and a 1-based</span>
<span class="sd">6-digit index inside that chunk. Chunk ids are zero-padded 4-digit strings.</span>

<span class="sd">The goal stated in the spec is **one source sentence to one translated</span>
<span class="sd">sentence** — chunking never merges or splits beyond what phrasplit returns.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Literal</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[import-not-found]</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Record</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.placeholders</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">collect_tokens</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ProseSpan&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;RECORD_ID_SCHEME&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;segmenter_metadata&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;segment_spans&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;pack_chunks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;spans_to_chunks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>

<span class="n">RECORD_ID_SCHEME</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chunk-local:v1&quot;</span>

<span class="c1"># phrasplit&#39;s simple backend expects spaCy-style model names for abbreviation</span>
<span class="c1"># lookup, even when spaCy is not used. Keep booktx deterministic by forcing the</span>
<span class="c1"># regex backend and mapping BCP-47-ish project language codes to phrasplit&#39;s</span>
<span class="c1"># abbreviation tables.</span>
<span class="n">_LANGUAGE_MODEL_BY_CODE</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ca&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ca_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;da&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;da_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;de&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;de_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;el&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;el_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;es&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;es_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;fi&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;fi_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;fr&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;fr_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;hr&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;hr_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;it&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;it_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;lt&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;lt_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;mk&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;mk_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;nb&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;nb_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;nl&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;nl_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;pl&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;pl_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;pt&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;pt_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ro&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ro_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ru&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ru_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;sl&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sl_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;sv&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sv_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;uk&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;uk_core_news_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">}</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="ProseSpan">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.chunking.ProseSpan">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A protected prose span produced by a format extractor.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``text`` is the prose or inline-XHTML fragment with names already replaced</span>
<span class="sd">    by placeholder tokens. ``placeholders`` lists every placeholder that</span>
<span class="sd">    appears anywhere in ``text``. Segmentation filters that list per record so</span>
<span class="sd">    each record carries only placeholders visible in its own source.</span>
<span class="sd">    ``protected_terms`` is the subset of names relevant to this span.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``presegmented`` means the upstream extractor already selected this span as</span>
<span class="sd">    one sentence/record. In that case booktx must not run phrasplit again.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``source_markup`` records the inline markup contract of the span so it can</span>
<span class="sd">    propagate into ``Record.source_markup`` for defense-in-depth record-level</span>
<span class="sd">    validation. The EPUB span manifest remains the authority at build time.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">presegmented</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;plain:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub-inline-xhtml:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;plain:v1&quot;</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_language_model</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="c1"># booktx config language codes are BCP-47-ish. phrasplit&#39;s abbreviation</span>
    <span class="c1"># tables are keyed by spaCy model names. Fall back to English for unknown</span>
    <span class="c1"># language codes so segmentation stays deterministic.</span>
    <span class="n">code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_LANGUAGE_MODEL_BY_CODE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">code</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_language_model</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">]</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="segmenter_metadata">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.chunking.segmenter_metadata">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">segmenter_metadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return deterministic metadata describing the extraction segmenter.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;phrasplit&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;mode&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;use_spacy&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;backend&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;regex&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">phrasplit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;__version__&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">version</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">payload</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="segment_spans">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.chunking.segment_spans">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">segment_spans</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Segment every span into one :class:`Record` per sentence.</span>

<span class="sd">    Empty/whitespace-only sentences are dropped so a span never yields a blank</span>
<span class="sd">    record. Each record carries only placeholders and protected terms visible</span>
<span class="sd">    in that record&#39;s source text.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">counter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">presegmented</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_record_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sentence</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">cleaned</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sentence</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">cleaned</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">visible_tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">collect_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cleaned</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="n">record_placeholders</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">p</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">placeholders</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">token</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">visible_tokens</span>
            <span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">record_terms</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">original</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">p</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_placeholders</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">p</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="n">counter</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">counter</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">06d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>  <span class="c1"># provisional; repack reassigns</span>
                    <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cleaned</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_terms</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_placeholders</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">span_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">span_record_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_record_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">records</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="pack_chunks">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.chunking.pack_chunks">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">pack_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Pack records into chunks of at most ``chunk_size`` and assign final ids.</span>

<span class="sd">    Final record ids are ``NNNN-NNNNNN`` (chunk id + 1-based intra-chunk index).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk_size</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk_size must be &gt;= 1&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_idx</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">bucket</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">renumbered</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">intra</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">rec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">bucket</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">renumbered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_copy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">intra</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">06d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">}))</span>
        <span class="n">schema_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="mi">3</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rec</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_markup</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub-inline-xhtml:v1&quot;</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">rec</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">renumbered</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">schema_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">schema_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">record_id_scheme</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">RECORD_ID_SCHEME</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">renumbered</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chunks</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="spans_to_chunks">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.chunking.spans_to_chunks">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">spans_to_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Convenience: segment spans then pack into chunks.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">segment_spans</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">pack_chunks</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
